# Æther Wealth

> Æther Wealth is a private-bank-grade wealth platform that unifies banking, investments, real estate, insurance, business holdings, and trust & estate planning into a single luxury mobile dashboard for individuals, advisors, attorneys, CPAs, and family offices.

Æther Wealth ("Aether Wealth") gives high-net-worth households a complete, real-time picture of net worth and an integrated workspace for the professionals around them. The platform connects bank, brokerage, and credit accounts via Plaid; tracks real estate equity using live property valuations; ingests insurance policies and estate documents via an AI document parser; and produces estate-plan summaries, beneficiary maps, budgets, and readiness scoring. A built-in Will Builder generates a formatted Last Will & Testament from existing household data. Audience portals serve Advisors, Attorneys, CPAs, Insurance professionals, Household Managers, Families, and Family Offices.

## Pages

- [Overview](/): Private wealth dashboard — net worth, financial health score, recent activity, budgets.
- [Investments](/portfolio): Holdings, allocation, and performance across connected brokerage accounts.
- [Real Estate & Legacy](/legacy): Properties, equity, wills, trusts, healthcare directives, beneficiaries.
- [Insurance](/protect): Life, property, umbrella, and liability coverage with beneficiary tracking.
- [Family Vault](/family): Household members, estate plan summary, total wealth passed on.
- [Business](/business): Business entity valuation, P&L, formation and EIN document vault.
- [Connections](/connections): Bank / brokerage links (Plaid), property data, unified document vault.
- [Budgets](/budgets): Monthly category budgets auto-linked to live transactions.
- [Will Builder](/will-builder): Guided 10-step wizard that drafts and saves a Last Will & Testament PDF.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Essential, Private, and Family Office tiers.
- [Sign Up](/signup): Create a private wealth vault.
- [Sign In](/signin): Access an existing vault.

## Audience portals

- [For Advisors](/portals/advisors): RIA and wealth-advisor workflows, household oversight, white-label.
- [For Attorneys](/portals/attorneys): Estate-planning attorney workspace and document review.
- [For CPAs](/portals/cpas): Tax-return review, basis tracking, year-end packets.
- [For Insurance Professionals](/portals/insurance): Coverage gap analysis and beneficiary review.
- [For Household Managers](/portals/household-managers): Day-to-day household operations.
- [For Families](/portals/families): Multi-generational shared household view.
- [For Family Offices](/portals/family-offices): Trustee and advisor seats, governance.

## Key capabilities

- Real-time net worth across banking, brokerage, real estate, insurance cash value, and business equity.
- AI document parser for insurance policies, wills, trusts, healthcare directives, and tax returns.
- Estate plan summary: beneficiary percentages, property allocations, final wishes & notes.
- Will Builder wizard with auto-populated family, executor, guardian, and beneficiary data.
- Plaid-powered transaction sync with auto-categorization and budget tracking.
- RentCast property valuations with auto-fetched street-view imagery.
- Concierge AI for portfolio, estate, and tax questions.
- Bank-grade security: TLS 1.2+, AES-256 at rest, MFA, HIBP breach screening, Row-Level Security on every table.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling.
- [Support](/support): Help and contact.
